form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months eased back early on 6th of 8 at Te Aroha on March 28 over 1600m, in the wet; 5.5 len behind Florenza with 57kg at $26.20. Previously second-up 4th of 15 at Te Rapa on May 3 over 2100m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Quick Fire carrying 59kg at $24.80. Strips fitter and expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained at the start to obtain cover from the outside barrier.
Baulked at the fourth fence.
Raced three wide without cover in the middle stages.
Had to be steadied when placed in restricted room approaching the 600m.
Slow to begin.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at Hawera October 4 over 2100m, on rain affected going; 38 len behind Piper's Son with 58.5kg at $25. Previously first up; 12th of 14 at Te Aroha June 2 over 1600m, in the wet; 20 len behind Eloise carrying 56.5kg at $97.40. Likely to make his presence felt.

Held up until near the 250m.

form.formComment: Last start 8th of 10 at Trentham on March 21 over 2100m, slow going 12 len behind Helluvah Return carrying 58kg at $4.60. The run before that 4th of 11 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1600m, slow going 1.2 len behind Victorious Warrior with 59kg at $13.70. Willing to give her another chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 6th of 13 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Berenhard with 60kg at $9. Last start 6th of 14 at Trentham on March 28 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Paddy The Farmer with 57kg at $12.20. Capable of sharp improvement.

Raced keenly through the middle stages when leading.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation when last of 12 at Hawera May 18 over 2100m, in the wet; 51 len behind Fourty Eight carrying 63kg at $77.20. First up last campaign 11th of 13 at Woodville April 30 over 1400m, soft track; 14 len behind Turnmeon carrying 59kg at $75.40. Hard to recommend.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide for the majority of the race.
Misjudged the second to last fence and landed awkwardly.
Misjudged the final fence.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign by 1.0 len Woodville September 7 over 4800m in the wet defeating Prince Turbo carrying 64kg at $5.60. When resuming last campaign tenth of 13 at Woodville April 30 over 1400m, soft track; 10 len behind Turnmeon carrying 54kg at $36.40. Likely to need this.

Ran down the second fence. Retired after the second-to-last fence.
Put in a poor jump at the first fence.
Restrained at the start to obtain cover from the outside barrier.

form.formComment: At the latest run didn't do much in the run home; ran last of 9 at Wanganui on April 6 over 2040m, 9 len behind Pacific Princess carrying 57kg at $16.20. The run before that raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at this track on March 11 over 1600m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Whats The One Code with 57kg at $7.50. Tough to beat if near his best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages, obtaining a substantial lead.
Inconvenienced passing the 100m.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 4th of 10 at Pukekohe on March 13 over 1400m, slow going 2.5 len behind Fleeting Glimpse carrying 58.5kg at $5.80. Last start raced on the pace before fading second last of 14 at Trentham on March 28 over 1400m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Paddy The Farmer with 54kg at $29.90. Better than last run and expected to take running down.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at Riccarton Park August 9 over 3100m, on heavy track; 14 len behind Duke Of Plumpton carrying 67kg at $6.80. When resuming last campaign ran last of 10 at Waverley April 10 2025 over 1650m, in the wet; 12 len behind Super Flash with 60kg at $10. Not keen.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Comes off a 40 day let-up. Resuming ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 7 at Tauranga on February 5 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind New Recruit carrying 54.5kg at $29.20. Second run from a spell 10th of 13 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1400m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Berenhard with 55.5kg at $34.90. Strong contender on best form.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of ten months. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Trentham June 28 over 4900m, on heavy track; 35 len behind Jesko with 66kg at $11.40. When resuming last campaign second last of 8 at Pukekohe April 23 over 2100m, on heavy track; 12 len behind Procella with 52kg at $38.20. Don't underestimate.
